core_idea: The Ring Fauvist Docent Rodion is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist / Support — damage scales with the number of debuff types on the target. Stack varied statuses before committing high-value skills. Scaling conditions: +5% per negative effect type (max +15%); Coin Power +1 per 2 types of negative effects (max +3). Support passive (**Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…**) keys off **deployment order** — set your main carry as #1 deployed before the fight.
playstyle_guide:
- **Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…** watches the **#1 deployed ally** — arrange the dashboard so the intended carry is first in line.
- Skills check **4+ Bleed** — favour those coins when stacked.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: +5% per negative effect type (max +15%).
- Stack several distinct status types on the target before using high-power skills — each debuff type adds to damage.

**S1 — Vehement Overpainting** (BP 6, CP +7, x1): rolls — low 6, high 13 (Extremely High).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +5% damage (up to +15%) — stack statuses broadly.
- +5% per negative effect type (max +15%)
- Inflict +1 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Sinking; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Mauled Color — Rouge —

**S2 — Expression of Primary Colors** (BP 4, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Extremely High stacked).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +20% damage (up to +60%) — stack statuses broadly.
- **Coin Power** scales with **types of negative effects** (+1 per 2, max +3) — build stacks first.
- +20% per negative effect type (max +60%)
- Peak output requires both conditions: Inflict +2 Sinking Count | [On Hit] Inflict 3 Mauled Color — Bleu —.

**S3 — Le Fauvisme - Déchaînement Brutal** (BP 4, CP +3, x4): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Each debuff type on the target adds +20% damage (up to +60%) — stack statuses broadly.
- +20% per negative effect type (max +60%)
- Inflict +2 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Mauled Color — Rouge —
- Inflict +2 Bleed Count; [On Hit] Inflict 1 Touche Hardie

*↳ Alternate S3 — Burst Forth the Pulsing Crimson under Your Skin* (BP 5, CP +3): rolls — low 5, high 8 (Extremely Low / Slightly Low stacked).
  - Unbreakable Coin

Combat passive — **Mentorship**: Turn Start: Gain L'Hommage equal to the number of Identities on the field (once per Encounter).
  - Turn Start: Randomly apply (# of The Ring Student Identities on the field) Offense Level Up or Defense Level Up to any 2 of The Ring Stud….

Combat passive — **Needs a Rougher Touch for this Part…!**: Inflict +1 more Mauled Color — Rouge —, Mauled Color — Bleu —, and Touche Hardie.

Defense skill — **Counter: Critique**: [Clashable Counter].
  - Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on target (max 40%).
  - If target has Palette Vibrante, deal +30% damage.
  - [On Use] If target has Palette Vibrante, gain 2 Clash Power Up.
team_suggestions: Trait-dependent kit — [The Ring] allies raise Resonance and unlock alternate skills. Resonance-scaling identity — each additional [The Ring] ally on the team directly improves skill and Counter output. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available.
- **The Ring Fauvist Student Meursault**: Shares [School of Fauvism] trait — presence raises Resonance, scaling Resonance-dependent skills and unlocking alternate skill variants.
- **The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu**: 'Please, Do Stop Running and Be Seated' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
- **The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust**: This identity's 'Nice and Slow, Don't Let It Break…' inflicts Bleed — The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust scales off Bleed.
